title: UPSSSC Moharir Recruitment 2022 Syllabus Notice for 92 Post in **Uttar Pradesh**
excerpt: The **Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC)** has released the advertisement for **Moharir Mains Examination 2022**. Candidates who are qualified in **UPSSSC PET 2021 Exam** can apply online.

About Organization

The **Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC)** is a government organization that conducts various recruitment exams for different posts in the state of **Uttar Pradesh**.
The organization is responsible for selecting eligible candidates for various government jobs in the state.

About the Programme

The **UPSSSC Moharir Recruitment 2022** is a recruitment exam conducted by the **Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC)** for the post of Moharir in the Geology and Mining Department of the **Uttar Pradesh** government.
The programme aims to select eligible candidates for the post of Moharir and provide them with a chance to work with the **Uttar Pradesh** government.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The **UPSSSC Moharir Recruitment 2022** is a great opportunity for candidates who are looking for a government job in the state of **Uttar Pradesh**.
The selection procedure for the post of Moharir is based on the **UPSSSC PET 2021 Exam** score and the eligibility criteria for the post.

CareerFlora Expert Insight Continued

The best strategy for candidates is to prepare well for the **UPSSSC PET 2021 Exam** and to ensure that they meet the eligibility criteria for the post of Moharir.
Candidates should also check the official website for the latest updates and notifications regarding the **UPSSSC Moharir Recruitment 2022**.
